/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/watchmooi.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/watchmooi.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/watchmooi.dir/src/player.cpp.o CMakeFiles/watchmooi.dir/src/firebase.cpp.o CMakeFiles/watchmooi.dir/src/sync.cpp.o -o watchmooi  /usr/lib/libcurl.so /usr/lib/libmpv.so /usr/lib/libcurl.so
